GenAiFunction.description: Queries open Opportunities and returns a pipeline summary broken down by stage, weighted value, and top deals.
GenAiFunction.capability: Use this action when the user asks for a pipeline overview, deal counts by stage, total pipeline value, weighted pipeline, top deals, or a summary of open opportunities. Examples: "What does my pipeline look like?", "How many deals do I have in each stage?", "What are my top 5 deals?", "Give me a pipeline breakdown for this quarter." Do not use for probability forecasting or opportunity updates.

genAiFunctionInputs.description: Only include opportunities closing within this many days. Use 90 for this quarter, 180 for this half-year. Leave blank for all open pipeline.
Salesforce User ID to filter by owner. Leave blank for all reps.
Salesforce Account ID to limit the summary to a single account.
Maximum number of top deals to list by value. Default is 5.

genAiFunctionOutputs.description: Natural language pipeline summary ready to deliver to the user.
Sum of all open opportunity amounts in USD.
Sum of (Amount x Probability) — a realistic revenue estimate.
Total number of open opportunities in the summary.
JSON array of stage breakdowns with count and value per stage.
JSON array of top deals by amount with name, stage, and close date.
True if the summary was generated successfully.
Error description if success is false.
